site.title: Halie McDonald - UI/UX Designer
site.description: I'm UI/UX designer, with a passion for creating intuitive and engaging digital experiences. I work with tools like Figma and modern web technologies including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.

supportLink.imageAlt: Buy Me a Coffee at ko-fi.com

about.title: About me
about.intro: Hi, I'm Halie, a UI/UX Designer from Edmonton, AB.
about.toolsIntro: My primary tools of choice includes:
about.passion: Outside of working on design projects, you will probably find me watching movies (quite a lot of them), listening to classic rock, or planning my next trip. I’ve always enjoyed storytelling in all forms, whether that’s a great film, a Springsteen album, or through visual design.
about.approach: Because I’ve spent time on both the design and development side, I like understanding the whole picture. I believe a good design should be intuitive, and built with real people in mind, not just trying to make something that's pretty to look at.
